query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `tiktok_commission_orders` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `brandId` int NOT NULL,
  `importHistoryId` int,
  `orderId` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `subOrderId` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `orderStatus` varchar(50),
  `creatorUsername` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `productName` text NOT NULL,
  `sku` text,
  `productId` varchar(64),
  `price` int NOT NULL,
  `quantity` int NOT NULL,
  `shopName` varchar(255),
  `shopCode` varchar(64),
  `contentType` varchar(50),
  `contentId` varchar(64),
  `partnerCommissionRate` decimal(5,2),
  `creatorCommissionRate` decimal(5,2),
  `partnerRewardRate` int,
  `creatorRewardRate` int,
  `partnerShopAdRate` int,
  `creatorShopAdRate` int,
  `estimatedCommissionBase` int,
  `estimatedPartnerCommission` decimal(12,2),
  `estimatedCreatorCommission` decimal(12,2),
  `estimatedPartnerReward` int,
  `estimatedCreatorReward` int,
  `estimatedCreatorShopAdPay` int,
  `estimatedPartnerShopAdPay` int,
  `actualCommissionBase` decimal(12,2),
  `actualPartnerCommission` decimal(12,2),
  `actualCreatorCommission` decimal(12,2),
  `actualPartnerReward` decimal(12,2),
  `actualCreatorReward` decimal(12,2),
  `actualPartnerShopAdPay` decimal(12,2),
  `actualCreatorShopAdPay` decimal(12,2),
  `returnQuantity` int DEFAULT 0,
  `refundQuantity` int DEFAULT 0,
  `orderCreatedAt` timestamp NULL,
  `orderDeliveredAt` timestamp NULL,
  `commissionSettledAt` timestamp NULL,
  `paymentId` varchar(64),
  `paymentMethod` varchar(50),
  `paymentAccount` varchar(50),
  `iva` int DEFAULT 0,
  `isr` int DEFAULT 0,
  `platform` varchar(20),
  `factorType` varchar(20),
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
command:
